Petition For The Termination Of Further Proceedings And For Discharge Of The Personal Representatove
Off Calendar Feb-13-2018 Continued To Mar-13-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on March 13, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why they have not fully responded to the Probate Examiner's notes. The Amended Petition for Final Distribution is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Petition For The Termination Of Further Proceedings And For Discharge Of The Personal Representatove
Off Calendar Jan-16-2018 Continued To Feb-13-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Greer Smith for Marcell Wade.

Ms. Greer stated that she took care of item number one in the notes, that she needs to take care of item number two, that she moved her office and that she temporarily misplaced her file. Ms. Greer also stated that she expects to get in touch with her Client, that it has been difficult getting a hold of him, that there are no assets, that it is not fair that she is not being paid and that she is paying filing fees out of pocket. Status on filing response to Examiner's notes and the amended petition for final distribution is continued to February 13, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court expects the notes to be responded to and an amended petition for final distribution to be filed.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Petition For The Termination Of Further Proceedings And For Discharge Of The Personal Representatove
Off Calendar Dec-19-2017 Continued To Jan-16-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on January 16, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why they have not responded to the Probate Examiner's notes. The Petition for Termination of Further Proceedings, etc. is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Estate
Off Calendar Mar-01-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Estate
Off Calendar Feb-01-2017 Continued To Mar-01-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Greer Smith for Marcell Wade.

Ms. Smith stated that she is in the process of trying to get a hold of her Client, that she was unaware of the last hearing, that the Estate consisted of a house that was heavily mortgaged and that the house was sold in foreclosure. Ms. Greer also stated that she was going to do a petition to terminate and that she got a hold of her Client's Mother yesterday and has a phone number. The order to appear is off calendar. Status on close of the Estate is continued to March 1, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Barrientos. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Feb-01-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Estate
Off Calendar Jan-04-2017 Continued To Feb-01-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The matter is on calendar for status of filing of a petition for final distribution or filing of a status report on close of the estate. The Court noted that the final inventory and appraisal is almost a year and a half old. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on February 1, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the petition for final distribution has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-01-2015 Granted Per Written Order
